ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., GPS tracker) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the device was deployed */,
  "retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date the device was retrieved */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the device (in months) */,
  "memory_capacity" INTEGER /* Memory capacity of the device (in GB) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for deployment */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being tracked */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of deployment (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "deployment_method" TEXT /* Method of deployment (e.g., by hand, by drone) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the animal */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the animal (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the data */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of data collection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the device location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the device location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the device location */,
  "x_speed" REAL /* X-component of the device speed */,
  "y_speed" REAL /* Y-component of the device speed */,
  "z_speed" REAL /* Z-component of the device speed */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading from the device */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading from the device */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration reading from the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_types" (
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day type */,
  "day_type" TEXT /* Type of day (e.g., winter, summer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the day type */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the day type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_classes" (
  "behavioral_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavioral class */,
  "behavioral_class" TEXT /* Behavioral class (e.g., fly, sit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavioral class */,
  "speed_range" TEXT /* Range of speeds associated with the behavioral class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavioral_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sunrise_sunset" (
  "sunrise_sunset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sunrise/sunset entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of sunrise/sunset */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "day_length" REAL /* Length of the day (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sunrise_sunset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_classes" (
  "speed_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed class */,
  "speed_class" TEXT /* Speed class (e.g., low, high) */,
  "speed_range" TEXT /* Range of speeds for the class (e.g., 0-5 km/h) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the speed class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data being annotated */,
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day type */,
  "behavioral_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the behavioral class */,
  "speed_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speed class */,
  "sunrise_sunset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sunrise/sunset entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_behavioral_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("behavioral_class_id") REFERENCES behavioral_classes ("behavioral_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_sunrise_sunset_id FOREIGN KEY ("sunrise_sunset_id") REFERENCES sunrise_sunset ("sunrise_sunset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_day_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_type_id") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_speed_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_class_id") REFERENCES speed_classes ("speed_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., battery replacement, software update) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_history" (
  "deployment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being deployed */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being tracked */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date of retrieval */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_history_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
